sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94966" key="skifo/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῑφός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κνιπός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</entryFree>
